name: OneItemToRuleThemAll
description: 将游戏生成的物品（起始/商店/箱子/传奇箱子）替换为目标物品。支持多目标 A-B-A-B 轮流替换、诅咒开关与原物品诅咒继承。进入游戏前在武器/难度选择界面右上角按钮配置。Replace all in-game items (starting/shop/crate/legendary crate) with target items. Supports A-B-A-B rotation, curse toggle and curse inheritance.

REPLACE_STARTING_ITEMS.description: If true, starting items are replaced by the target items. Default is false.

REPLACE_SHOP_ITEMS.description: If true, shop items are replaced by the target items. Default is true.

REPLACE_CRATE_ITEMS.description: If true, items from crates (and loot/treasure map) are replaced by the target items. Default is true.

REPLACE_LEGENDARY_CRATE_ITEMS.description: If true, items from legendary crates are replaced by the target items. Default is false.
